configurations.name: with_skill
configurations.description: Using the release skill with gather-release-data.sh script

configurations.name: without_skill
configurations.description: Baseline: no skill, agent figures out release process from repo docs

notes: CRITICAL: Pass rates understate the skill advantage. All 3 baselines hallucinated 7 phantom PRs (#797, #798, #800, #801, #802, #804, #806) that don't exist. No assertion penalizes this. The with-skill runs had zero hallucinated PRs.
All 3 baselines missed 9 real PRs that the with-skill runs correctly included.
The one consistent with-skill 'failure' (helm-changelog format) is actually correct — the assertion was wrong about the expected format.
Baselines used 2x more tool calls (33-39 vs 15-18) and took ~23% longer despite producing worse results.
The gather-release-data.sh script eliminates hallucination by providing structured, verified PR data from the GitHub API.
